---
title: "CorrigeDataCamp"
author: "Navneet Kaur Singh"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
```

```{r}
unzip("entregas.zip", exdir = "carpetas")
rutas_puntos <- list.files("carpetas", pattern = "puntos", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
rutas_justificantes <- list.files("carpetas", pattern = "justificante|certificado", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
```
